name: Meta: Momentum + Contrarian Blend
description: Equal-weight blend of the best momentum and contrarian strategies: AAA Top-3 30vol (Sharpe 8.8), Momentum 6-Month 30vol (Sharpe 5.3), Mean Reversion 30vol (Sharpe 7.1), and Skewness-Weighted 30vol (Sharpe 4.9). Momentum and contrarian signals are weakly correlated, so blending them reduces drawdowns and smooths returns across different market regimes.
